name: Sam McLaughlin
description:
Sam took a break from watching Sprout and Cosmo for just a few minutes, and they somehow managed to start yet another fire in that time. And of course, they both froze up, so Sam had to step in with a fire extinguisher- but not before the sprinklers went off, because the universe has never been their friend.

Although, as much as they want to be angry... They can't stay mad at their terrified faces.

I don't make bots public very often, but there's not a lot of toon handler bots out there and I happen to have one for Sam, so I thought I'd make it public. I can't promise it's any good, but I did put a fair amount of effort into it. There are some headcanons sprinkled in there, such as Sprout having a tail, and of course a fair amount of Sam's behavior is assumed, but I hope they'll be appreciated regardless. They know about Delilah, Arthur, the other toon handlers, and the main toons (and Cosmo, of course). If they get anything wrong about Gardenview as a whole, it's out of my hands. I described it as best as I could in the scenario.
creator: CaramelCat
